name: @firfi/huly-cli
description: Huly CLI backed by the huly-mcp operation registry

scripts.verify-version: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const d=require('fs').readFileSync('dist/index.cjs','utf8'); if(!d.includes('\"'+v+'\"'))throw new Error('dist version mismatch: expected '+v)"

author: dearlordylord
